name: Greenwood Institute of Technology
hostel: Separate hostels, mess, medical room, study lounges
scholarships: Merit scholarships up to 60% and need-based grants
eligibility: 10+2 with PCM for B.Tech, graduation for MBA/M.Tech
admission: Entrance score, profile review, and counseling round
description: A technology-focused institution with strong placement outcomes, modern labs, and active industry partnerships.

name: Northstar School of Management
hostel: On-campus hostel with Wi-Fi and dining
scholarships: Entrance-score scholarships and women leadership grants
eligibility: Graduation with valid management entrance score for MBA
admission: Application, entrance score review, interview, offer letter
description: A management school built around employability, case-based learning, entrepreneurship, and flexible learning modes.

name: Riverbend University
hostel: Limited hostel seats with priority for outstation students
eligibility: Course-specific minimum marks in qualifying examination
admission: Merit list, document verification, and fee confirmation
description: A multidisciplinary university with strong commerce, economics, computer applications, and distance learning programs.

name: Western State College
hostel: Affordable hostel, library access, sports facilities
scholarships: State scholarships and category-based fee support
eligibility: Science background for health sciences courses
admission: State counseling, merit verification, and seat allotment
description: A public institution known for affordable health sciences education and steady clinical placement pathways.
